TYPE: CHAR

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: 0 = Unknown Value (but present in

1 = Paid standard hospital OPPS

2 = Services not paid under OPPS 
Pricer; paid under fee schedule or 
other payment system (status 
indicators A, G, K)
